name: TimetrackingWorkspace
description: Members, clients, and projects with role-based access for time tracking.

operations.name: ADD_MEMBER
operations.schema:
input AddMemberInput {
  id: OID!
  address: String
  did: String
  name: String!
  avatarUrl: URL
  role: MemberRole!
}

errors.name: DuplicateMemberError
errors.description: A member with this id or address already exists.

operations.name: UPDATE_MEMBER

errors.name: MemberNotFoundError
errors.description: No member with this id exists.

operations.name: SET_MEMBER_ROLE

errors.name: MemberNotFoundError
errors.description: No member with this id exists.

operations.name: ARCHIVE_MEMBER

errors.name: MemberNotFoundError
errors.description: No member with this id exists.

operations.name: ADD_CLIENT

errors.name: DuplicateClientError
errors.description: A client with this id already exists.

operations.name: UPDATE_CLIENT

errors.name: ClientNotFoundError
errors.description: No client with this id exists.

operations.name: ARCHIVE_CLIENT

errors.name: ClientNotFoundError
errors.description: No client with this id exists.

operations.name: ADD_PROJECT
operations.schema:
input AddProjectInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  clientId: OID
  color: String!
  billable: Boolean!
  hourlyRate: Amount_Money
}

errors.name: DuplicateProjectError
errors.description: A project with this id already exists.

errors.name: ClientNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced client does not exist.

operations.name: UPDATE_PROJECT
operations.schema:
input UpdateProjectInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String
  clientId: OID
  color: String
  billable: Boolean
  hourlyRate: Amount_Money
}

errors.name: ProjectNotFoundError
errors.description: No project with this id exists.

operations.name: ARCHIVE_PROJECT

errors.name: ProjectNotFoundError
errors.description: No project with this id exists.
